textByHash.35b9f025db633f5e2438d526dfe03e7926384e6a: What are yooo interrupting me for? Can't you see I'm working here?
textByHash.c1eb138345e545bbaa76417fc03b97001abde1b8: Moo, what do yoooou think you're doing?
textByHash.11ec0aa3c160ad33435e4bc8152c2e3b4fec0a21: How exactly am I going to get lost when I'm tied down? What were yooo really doing?
textByHash.6a741fc27ab4bddda8232af54b3629efc0052b47: I'm a talking cow, I'll believe almost anything.
textByHash.f364ff2e5d4e943c47f960ecf0e4624b7919f731: Well why didn't you say so? I've got a ton of these things. Go ahead and take the bell.
